summary: Backend (10/10 pytest) + frontend smoke pass. Health, AI chat (Claude Haiku 4.5 via Emergent LLM key) with & without history, auth gating (401/400), seeded-session /api/auth/me + /api/progress upsert (with portrait persistence) all verified end-to-end on the public URL. Frontend: login screen renders (UrduDuo logo, Google btn, guest link), guest navigates into app with sidebar (Learn/Alphabet/Writing/Pronunciation/AI Tutor/Progress), AI Tutor shows a real backend-generated Urdu greeting ('السلام علیکم!...') and replies to user message. Mobile 390x844 hides sidebar (transform translateX(-286px)) and exposes a ☰ hamburger which on click slides sidebar to left:0. Birthday overlay for Srushti renders the new Urdu poem (گیندے marigold poem), does NOT contain 'Saalgirah Mubarak Ho' or 'Teri muskurahat', and the green SVG <svg class='duo-owl'> is present.
action_items: OPTIONAL/MINOR: The Duolingo owl's speech bubble (index.html line 610) still says 'Saalgirah ki ḍher saari mubarakbaad, Srushti!'. The two explicitly forbidden phrases ('Saalgirah Mubarak Ho' and 'Teri muskurahat') are gone as required, but the word 'Saalgirah' still appears in this bubble. If the user's intent was to remove ALL 'Saalgirah' wording, replace it with something like 'Janamdin mubarak, Srushti!' or 'Happy birthday, Srushti!'. Not blocking — current implementation passes the literal acceptance criteria.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: /api/auth/session sets cookie with secure=True, samesite='none' — correct for cross-site Emergent preview. Good.
server.py: get_current_user falls back to Authorization Bearer header when no cookie — enables backend testing without browser. Good.
server.py: all DB queries exclude {'_id':0} — no ObjectId leaks. Confirmed in /api/auth/me response.
index.html: single static file is ~1955 lines. Functional, but will become hard to maintain. Consider splitting CSS, screens, and JS into separate files for future iterations.

index.html boot block calls processSessionFromHash → fetchMe → pullCloudProgress → loginUser. Cross-device login confirmed working via seeded session test (backend returns same user JSON across requests).
test_credentials: Auto-seeded TEST_ user + session via fixture (cleans up after). See /app/memory/test_credentials.md for manual mongosh seeding instructions.
seed_data_creation: Each test run creates one TEST_user_<hex> with a TEST_session_<hex> token in users/user_sessions/user_progress; torn down by fixture.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend public URL: https://universal-login-1.preview.emergentagent.com. Run `MONGO_URL=mongodb://localhost:27017 DB_NAME=test_database REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://universal-login-1.preview.emergentagent.com pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v`. For UI birthday test, use page.evaluate to set S.currentUser='srushti'; loginUser('srushti','Srushti'); showBday(). AI chat is real (no mocks). Note: AI greeting is fetched asynchronously, allow ~6-8s wait.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no failures encountered. All review-requested behaviours pass.
